title: Histone H1 Variants Regulate Neurodevelopmental Transcriptional Programs in Autism with 16p11.2 deletion
authors: Brudno R, Askayo D, Khair D, Shayevitch R, Keydar I, Zmudjak-Olevson M, Lev-Maor G, Zavolan M, Elkon R, Ast G
autism_relevance: HIGH - GWAS associations between ASD susceptibility and HIST1 histone cluster; transcriptomic profiling in idiopathic ASD, 16p11.2 hemi-deletion carriers, schizophrenia, bipolar disorder; iPSC-derived NPCs, neurons, and cerebral organoids; MAZ-dependent regulation of H1 dosage.
